Make a DE Volcano plot.

static_volcano_plot.Rd

Internal function for plotting static versions of volcano plots.

Usage

static_volcano_plot(
  data,
  lfc_thresh,
  pval_thresh,
  contrast,
  pval_type,
  control_proteins = NULL,
  anno = NULL,
  highlight_by = "uniprot_id"
)

Arguments

data

Per-contrast DE results to be plotted, as prepared by prep_plot_model_data.

lfc_thresh

The logFC threshold used to determine significance (significant when |logFC| > lfc.tresh). LogFC are base 2.

pval_thresh

The p-value threshold used to determine significance (significant when p < pval_thresh).

contrast

The contrast being plotted. Used for generating the plot title.

pval_type

The type of p-value to plot. Can be "raw" or "adjusted".

Value

A ggplot object.
